description: Pins selected apps (VS Code, ConEmu, Notepad++, Windows Notepad, Chrome) to the Windows taskbar.

messages.scriptDisabled: Pin-to-taskbar script is disabled in config.
messages.noApps: No apps requested. Use: pin-taskbar all  |  pin-taskbar vscode,chrome  |  pin-taskbar terminal
messages.exeMissing: [CODE RED] No installed exe found for {label}. Tried: {paths}
messages.pinAlready: {label} already pinned to taskbar (skipped, no action taken).
messages.pinVerbHidden: {label} skipped -- Windows 11 hides the 'Pin to taskbar' verb -- exe: {exe} -- treating as already-installed (pin manually via right-click if needed).
messages.pinFailed: [CODE RED] Failed to pin {label} to taskbar -- exe: {exe} -- Reason: {reason}
messages.summary: Pin summary: {ok} pinned, {already} already-pinned, {fail} failed, {missing} missing.
messages.doneWarn: Taskbar pin step finished with warnings -- see above.

commands.<apps>: Comma-separated keys: all | terminal | vscode | conemu | notepadpp | notepad | chrome
